phrases.text_local: Le marché du Boulingrin, c'est quand ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh mar-SHAY dew boo-lan-GRAN, say KON
phrases.cultural_note: The Marché du Boulingrin is held Saturday mornings in and around the famous Art Deco covered market hall — one of the finest in France.

responses.english: It is held every Wednesday and Saturday morning, from 7 am to 2 pm.
responses.phonetic: KAHN tah-LYUH luh MAR-shay dyoo boo-lan-GRAN
responses.local: Il se tient tous les mercredis et samedis matin, de 7h à 14h.

phrases.intent_en: Is the market hall a listed historic monument?
phrases.text_local: La halle est classée monument historique ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah AL eh klas-SAY moh-new-MON ees-toh-REEK
phrases.cultural_note: The Halle du Boulingrin (1929) is an Art Deco masterpiece — a vast concrete shell structure listed as a historic monument. Worth visiting even when the market isn't on.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the Boulingrin covered market is
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce que le marché couvert du Boulingrin ?
phrases.pronunciation: kes kuh luh mar-SHAY koo-VAIR doo boo-lan-GRAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Boulingrin market hall is a masterpiece of Art Deco architecture built in 1929, its vast reinforced-concrete vault spanning 70 metres.

responses.english: It's an Art Deco market listed as a historic monument.
responses.phonetic: say tuhn mar-SHAY ar day-KOH klah-SAY moh-noo-MAHN ees-toh-REEK.
responses.local: C'est un marché Art Déco classé monument historique.

phrases.intent_en: Ask on which days the market is open
phrases.text_local: Le marché est ouvert quels jours ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh mar-SHAY ay too-VAIR kel ZHOOR

responses.phonetic: luh mair-KRUH-dee, vahn-DRUH-dee ay sam-DEE mah-TAN.
responses.local: Le mercredi, vendredi et samedi matin.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest tram stop is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'arrêt de tramway le plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah-RAY duh TRAM-way luh ploo PROSH

responses.english: Boulingrin, on line A, right opposite.
responses.phonetic: boo-lan-GRAN, soor lah LEEN-yuh AH, zhoos tahn FAHS.
responses.local: Boulingrin, sur la ligne A, juste en face.
